description: Canonical file-based task queue for AI agents working in this repo.

tasks.title: Stabilize Strategy Pipeline performance, gates, and artifact evidence
acceptance: Strategy catalog uses lightweight backend evidence and no longer blocks on exact SQLite table counts.
Strategy audit keeps database health visible without doing expensive counts unless explicitly requested.
Blocked validation gate actions run validation against the latest backtest instead of rerunning a full backtest.
Strategy Detail can list and load comparable backtest artifacts by artifact_id.
Implementation handoff names files changed, verification, risks, assumptions, and next action.
tasks.notes: Implementation ready for review. Scope is local strategy review reliability; credentials and promotion routing are out of scope.

tasks.title: Review the initial file-based agent harness
acceptance: AGENTS.md gives new agents a progressive navigation map.
The task queue, progress files, role contracts, and file-harness docs exist.
npm run agent:check passes.
A reviewer can write progress/review_file_harness_bootstrap.md without needing chat context.
tasks.notes: Initial harness structure is queued for reviewer approval after bootstrap implementation.

tasks.title: Create and backtest OI Expansion Failure Fade strategy
acceptance: Strategy spec exists for oi_expansion_failure_fade with hypothesis, regimes, rules, costs, risk, validation, and failure modes.
Backend strategy package exists with deterministic logic, scoring, risk, paper, and registered backtest workflow.
Backtest artifacts are generated with fee metadata, symbol leaderboard, exit reasons, and robust assessment.
Validation artifact is generated and paper candidate is created only if validation reaches ready-for-paper.
Implementation handoff names files changed, verification, risks, assumptions, and next action.
verification: python3 -m unittest tests.test_backtest_filters tests.test_backtest_fees_and_scalper tests.test_strategy_catalog tests.test_oi_expansion_failure_fade
npm run hf:backtest -- --strategy oi_expansion_failure_fade --symbols BTC,SOL,HYPE --fee-model taker --lookback-days 3
npm run hf:backtest -- --strategy oi_expansion_failure_fade --symbols BTC,SOL,HYPE --fee-model mixed --maker-ratio 0.35 --lookback-days 3
npm run hf:paper -- --strategy oi_expansion_failure_fade --report <primary_report> --validation <validation_report> when validation is ready-for-paper
tasks.notes: Human explicitly requested implementation of the OI Expansion Failure Fade plan. Implementation is ready for review. Validation is blocked, and paper candidate generation was intentionally skipped. This is research/backtesting only; no live trading, credentials, production routing, or promotion is in scope. Any future live or production path remains blocked behind research, backtest, validation, paper evidence, risk review, operator sign-off, monitoring, rollback, and a production runbook.

tasks.title: Define the future live trading promotion gate package
acceptance: Document required research, backtest, validation, paper, risk, operator sign-off, monitoring, and rollback evidence.
Define what remains impossible for agents without explicit human approval.
Map promotion evidence to stable hf:* commands and backend artifacts.
tasks.notes: Blocked until the human explicitly requests production/live gate design. Live remains a future path, not an agent shortcut.

tasks.title: Create and backtest BTC Failed Impulse Reversal strategy
acceptance: Strategy spec exists for btc_failed_impulse_reversal with hypothesis, regimes, rules, costs, risk, validation, and failure modes.
Backend strategy package exists with deterministic logic, scoring, risk, paper, and registered BTC backtest workflow.
Backtest artifacts are generated on BTC with fee metadata, exit reasons, and robust assessment.
Validation artifact is generated and paper candidate is created only if validation reaches ready-for-paper.
Implementation handoff names files changed, verification, risks, assumptions, and next action.
verification: python3 -m unittest tests.test_backtest_filters tests.test_backtest_fees_and_scalper tests.test_strategy_catalog tests.test_btc_failed_impulse_reversal
npm run hf:backtest -- --strategy btc_failed_impulse_reversal --symbol BTC --fee-model taker --lookback-days 3
npm run hf:paper -- --strategy btc_failed_impulse_reversal --report <primary_report> --validation <validation_report> when validation is ready-for-paper
tasks.notes: Human asked for the best Bitcoin trading strategy with backtesting and maximum possible return. BTC Failed Impulse Reversal is the best current local BTC candidate: 2026-05-06 taker-fee backtest returned 0.97% with 9 trades, 88.89% win rate, 22.68 profit factor, 0.05% max drawdown, robust gate passes, and validation is ready-for-paper. Paper payload is standby because latest signal is none. This task remains research/backtesting/paper-candidate only; no live trading, credentials, production routing, or promotion is in scope. Any future live or production path remains blocked behind research, backtest, validation, paper evidence, risk review, operator sign-off, monitoring, rollback, and a production runbook.
